name: Jeff Tyzik
abstract: Jeff Tyzik (born Jeff Tkazyik, August 1, 1951) is an American conductor, arranger, and trumpeter. He has recorded jazz albums as a soloist and arranged pop and jazz music for orchestras.

works_created.t: Concerto for Trombone and Wind Ensemble

about_quotes.speaker: Vince DiMartino
about_quotes.evidence: my favorite trumpet section was I played, Joe Mosello, Jeff Tyzik, and Al Vizutti.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince DiMartino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 8, 2025
